mapper.select: SELECT goods_no as goodsNo, goods_name as goodsName, image_url as imageUrl, price FROM goods ORDER BY goods_name ASC OFFSET #{start} ROWS FETCH NEXT 12 ROWS ONLY
SELECT goods_no as goodsNo, goods_id as goodsId, goods_name as goodsName, price, image_url as imageUrl, category, stock, team_id as teamId, reg_date FROM goods WHERE goods_no=#{no}

SELECT goods_no as goodsNo, goods_name as goodsName, image_url as imageUrl, price, category FROM goods WHERE 1=1
AND category = #{category}
AND goods_name LIKE '%'||#{ss}||'%'
ORDER BY goods_name ASC OFFSET #{start} ROWS FETCH NEXT 12 ROWS ONLY
